recommendations.title: Sink or Swim

recommendations.title: Narco
recommendations.overview: Gustave Klopp suffers from narcolepsy, he can fall asleep everwhere at anytime whithout warning. Living a simple life with his wife Pam and his best friend Lenny Bar, Gus decides to undergo therapy sessions and finds out that he can make incredible c

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: And Their Children After Them
recommendations.overview: In eastern France, two teenage cousins have the summer of their lives when they paddle a purloined canoe to the far shore of a lake.

recommendations.title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
recommendations.overview: A sprawling drama centered on five key days in a family's life.

recommendations.title: Little White Lies
recommendations.overview: Despite a traumatic event, a group of friends decide to go ahead with their annual beach vacation. Their relationships, convictions, sense of guilt and friendship are sorely tested. They are finally forced to own up to the little white lies they've b

recommendations.title: Vincent N Roxxy
recommendations.overview: A small town loner and a rebellious punk rocker unexpectedly fall in love as they are forced on the run and soon discover violence follows them everywhere.

recommendations.title: The Players
recommendations.overview: Eight short films explore the subject of male infidelity. Serial cheaters, Fred and Greg, spend a night on the town doing what they do best, and with absolutely no regrets. The duo play various characters in assorted extracurricular situations, rangi
recommendations.director: Michel Hazanavicius, Emmanuelle Bercot, Gilles Lellouche, Jean Dujardin, Fred Cavayé, Alexandre Courtes, Eric Lartigau

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: The Last Letter from Your Lover
recommendations.overview: A young journalist in London becomes obsessed with a series of letters she discovers that recounts an intense star-crossed love affair from the 1960s.
